faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Every tip is timestamp-locked using Telegram's server time, 60 minutes before kickoff. Tips cannot be edited or deleted after submission. Odds must be between 1.30 and 10.00.
faq.a2: Each month, 70% of subscription revenue is split among the top 10 tipsters by ROI. #1 gets 25%, #2 gets 18%, down to #10 who gets 4%. You need 30+ tips and positive ROI to qualify.
faq.a3: The free channel receives the same tips as VIP, but with a 2-hour delay. If a match kicks off before the delay ends, the tip is not posted publicly.
faq.a4: We cover 11 major leagues: La Liga, Premier League, Champions League, Europa League, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, Eredivisie, Primeira Liga, Brasileirão, and MLS.
faq.q5: Can I stay anonymous as a tipster?
faq.a5: Yes! You choose a public alias. Your real identity is only known to us for payment purposes (Stripe KYC). Your alias is what subscribers see.
faq.q6: Can I tip on other platforms too?
faq.a6: Absolutely. There's no exclusivity requirement. You're free to operate on other platforms simultaneously.
